_comment: Script 57 -- Context Menu Bundle. Runs script 31 (PowerShell Here) and 52 (VS Code folder repair) in one guided flow.

components.title: PowerShell Here (normal + admin)
components.description: Adds 'Open PowerShell Here' and 'Open PowerShell Here (Admin)' to folder + folder background right-click menus.

components.title: VS Code folder context menu repair
components.description: Restores 'Open with Code' on folders, removes redundant file/background entries, and refreshes Explorer.

components.title: ConEmu Here (normal + admin)
components.description: Adds 'Open ConEmu Here' and 'Open ConEmu Here as Admin' to folder + folder background right-click menus.
